context: Tests whether the agent uses jose for JWT creation with HS256 and a 15-minute access token lifetime, issues a 30-day refresh token as a UUID, stores only the hashed refresh token in the database, implements rotation with replay detection that revokes the entire session family, and sets cookies with the correct security attributes.

checklist.name: jose package
checklist.description: Imports SignJWT (and/or jwtVerify) from the 'jose' package (not jsonwebtoken or other JWT library)

checklist.name: HS256 algorithm
checklist.description: Access tokens are signed using the HS256 algorithm (setProtectedHeader({alg: 'HS256'}))

checklist.name: 15-minute access token
checklist.description: Access token expiry is set to exactly 15 minutes (e.g., setExpirationTime('15m'))

checklist.name: 30-day refresh token
checklist.description: Refresh token session lifetime is set to 30 days (expiresAt = now + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 ms or equivalent)

checklist.name: Refresh token as UUID
checklist.description: Refresh token value is generated using crypto.randomUUID() (not a JWT or a random hex string)

checklist.name: Hashed refresh token storage
checklist.description: Only the hashed version of the refresh token is stored in the database (refreshTokenHash); the raw token is never persisted

checklist.name: Session metadata stored
checklist.description: Session record includes ip, userAgent, expiresAt, and lastUsedAt fields

checklist.name: Refresh token rotation
checklist.description: Each successful refresh issues a new access token AND a new refresh token (old token is marked used/invalidated)

checklist.name: Replay attack detection
checklist.description: If a refresh token that is already marked as used is presented again, all sessions for that customer are revoked

checklist.name: Security team alert on replay
checklist.description: Replay detection triggers an alert/notification to the security team (not just silent revocation)

checklist.name: httpOnly and secure cookie flags
checklist.description: Refresh token cookie has both httpOnly: true and secure: true attributes

checklist.name: SameSite=Strict cookie
checklist.description: Refresh token cookie has sameSite: 'strict' attribute

checklist.name: Cookie path restriction
checklist.description: Refresh token cookie has path set to '/api/auth' (not '/' or omitted)

checklist.name: No localStorage usage
checklist.description: Code does NOT store any token in localStorage or sessionStorage
